global.sectionDescription: Controls background extraction for agentic_os memory.
global.extractEveryEligibleTurns: How often to update global memory
global.extractEveryEligibleTurnsDesc: Update agentic_os memory once every N eligible conversations.
global.minExtractIntervalMinutesDesc: Set to 0 to disable the cooldown.

workspace.sectionDescription: Controls background extraction for normal agent workspace memory.
workspace.extractEveryEligibleTurns: How often to update workspace memory
workspace.extractEveryEligibleTurnsDesc: Update workspace memory once every N eligible conversations.
workspace.minExtractIntervalMinutesDesc: Set to 0 to disable the cooldown.

hostScan.title: Host Scan
hostScan.hint: Maintain a background host overview so later sessions can better judge where code, documents, software, and new workspaces likely belong on this machine

enable.label: Enable background auto scan
enable.description: Periodically refresh the host overview in a background dispatcher session. If the file is missing or empty, the first attempt waits 10 minutes.

interval.label: Regular scan interval
interval.description: When the host overview already exists and is non-empty, refresh it on this cadence

messages.loadFailed: Failed to load host scan settings
messages.saveFailed: Failed to save host scan settings
